 ┖┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┈┚"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696399824,"group_id":"7257766714820004920","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"⦮_  ̫ _⦯ 世界破破烂烂 小猫尝尝咸淡","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N9F7Aygzll9FolZhJvGWmxhEuGGCFOiFcVP624w8peI8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7084fbd5821847ae9db9d182e3e200d1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791099&x-signature=GEjdZRx7gxJFEVMe6dkTBRLTSVM%3D","user_id":"2960315453554430","user_name":"打开天窗说脏话As"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2960315453554430","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1705591287,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7257766714820004920","book_info":{"abstract":"【双洁1v1+神经病没安全感疯批攻+极度宠攻的受+全程甜】

　　海城所有人都知道，安喻是一个天才，无论面对什么人，他都进退有度，脸上带着得体笑容。

　　无数人都想在安总面前混个眼熟，又或者更进一步发展，但无一成功，无他，安喻心底住着个人。

　　*

　　六年前安喻不告而别，如今他与江辞晏时隔多年重逢，却发现江辞晏变得有些奇怪。

　　吃饭的时候，他回对象消息，江辞晏哼哼唧唧：“你在回谁的消息呀，我在你面前你都不跟我说话。”

　　赶早八的时候，江辞晏指着身边的位置：“我能给你占位置，哥哥你女朋友做不到吧~”

　　安喻似笑非笑。

　　江辞晏一直以为安喻喜欢女生，重逢后他费尽心机，隐瞒身份，跟安喻来了一场网恋。

　　结果眼睁睁看着安喻越来越爱他装出来的那个女生，江辞晏终于坐不住了。

　　凭什么，哥哥应该爱他才对，难道就因为他是男人吗？

　　直到安喻在与对象约定的地方见到江辞晏。

　　江辞晏微微歪头：“哥哥在等谁？”

　　安喻抬眸与他对视，轻缓道：“爱人。”

　　江辞晏将手机扔在桌上，聊天记录昭然若揭，他声音低哑，带着危险。

　　“哥哥能喜欢上网上的我，一定也会喜欢现实的我的，对吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o410fe3d99b67948052d31f93341f3d97~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"七幸言","author_id":"","book_id":"7257766714820004920","book_name":"花买了，情定了，我是男的又怎样","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#202028","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":29,"name":"总裁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=29&name=总裁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7269336277194015271","read_count":"14070","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"317922"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.4","serial_count":"153","tags":"双男主,现代,总裁,天才,甜宠,双洁,1v1,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o410fe3d99b67948052d31f93341f3d97~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779444786&x-signature=%2F74wAySSOOUPg7qCmFxTVYdN3cA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2819626058134167","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"
